clusters.justification: Captures the overarching domain of emotional valence, arousal, and autonomic regulation typically subserved by the insula-amygdala-mPFC co-activation axis.
Represents the latent computational axis of incentive evaluation, reinforcement processing, and goal-directed decision-making governed by corticostriatal pathways.
Encompasses the integrated processing of internally directed representations regarding the self, others, and social concepts anchored in the default mode network.
